step_rationale: Platelet secretion marker (CD63); indicates α-granule release during activation.
mechanism: Exposed on the platelet surface upon α-granule exocytosis during platelet activation and thrombus formation.

references.title: Plant-based Food Cyanidin-3-Glucoside Modulates Human Platelet Glycoprotein VI Signaling and Inhibits Platelet Activation and Thrombus Formation.
